fields.title: Error when task type config references non-existent skills
fields.description:
Same issue as tau-8oj but for skills.

Currently, if a task type config specifies skills that don't exist, they are silently ignored.

Expected behavior:
- Validate that all skills in task type configs exist
- Produce clear error listing unknown skills
- Fail fast on invalid config

Related: tau-8oj (same issue for tools)
fields.close_reason: Validate task tool configs and error on unknown skill names.
